{{CargoRelic
|name=collection@20747_1
|class_id=20747
|rank=Green
|affct=FAITH
|source=
|description=collection@20747_2
|fame=13
|art=14
|fth=34
|civ=15
|tech=14
|ss1=Snail Leadership +1<br>Per Demon God Sculpture owned, Snail HP +500<br>Demon God Sculptures Owned: 8/8
|ss2=Snail Leadership +2<br>Per Demon God Sculpture owned, Snail HP +1000<br>Demon God Sculptures Owned: 8/8
|ss3=Snail Leadership +3<br>Per Demon God Sculpture owned, Snail HP +1500<br>Demon God Sculptures Owned: 8/8
|ss4=Snail Leadership +3<br>Per Demon God Sculpture owned, Snail HP +1500<br>Demon God Sculptures Owned: 8/8
|ss7=Snail Leadership +3<br>Per Demon God Sculpture owned, Snail HP +1500<br>Demon God Sculptures Owned: 8/8<br> (Awakened)
}}
